overlays.name: Insurance Policy
overlays.description: A verifiable credential representing a comprehensive insurance policy covering life, health, property, and auto coverage types.

attribute_information.policy_number: Unique identifier assigned to this insurance policy.
attribute_information.policy_holder_name: Full legal name of the policy holder.
attribute_information.policy_start_date: Date on which the policy coverage begins.
attribute_information.policy_end_date: Date on which the policy coverage expires.
attribute_information.currency: Currency in which the premium and benefits are denominated.
attribute_information.coverage.LifeCoverage.sum_assured: Total amount guaranteed to be paid on death or maturity.
attribute_information.coverage.LifeCoverage.policy_term_years: Duration of the life insurance policy in years.
attribute_information.coverage.LifeCoverage.premium_frequency: Frequency of premium payment (monthly, quarterly, annually).
attribute_information.coverage.LifeCoverage.death_benefit: Lump-sum amount paid to the beneficiary upon the insured's death.
attribute_information.coverage.LifeCoverage.maturity_benefit: Amount paid to the policy holder at the end of the policy term.
attribute_information.coverage.LifeCoverage.surrender_value: Cash value the policy holder receives upon early termination.
attribute_information.coverage.HealthCoverage.sum_insured: Maximum amount covered for medical expenses per policy year.
attribute_information.coverage.HealthCoverage.deductible_amoun: Amount the insured must pay before insurance coverage begins.
attribute_information.coverage.HealthCoverage.copay_percentage: Percentage of each medical bill paid by the insured.
attribute_information.coverage.HealthCoverage.network_type: Type of provider network (HMO, PPO, EPO, POS).
attribute_information.coverage.HealthCoverage.waiting_period_d: Number of days before certain coverages take effect.
attribute_information.coverage.HealthCoverage.pre_existing_con: Indicates whether pre-existing medical conditions are covered.
attribute_information.coverage.PropertyCoverage.property_addre: Full address of the insured property.
attribute_information.coverage.PropertyCoverage.building_value: Replacement value of the building structure.
attribute_information.coverage.PropertyCoverage.contents_value: Value of contents and personal belongings covered.
attribute_information.coverage.PropertyCoverage.location_risk_: Risk classification of the property location (A–E).
attribute_information.coverage.PropertyCoverage.flood_zone: Official flood zone designation for the property location.
attribute_information.coverage.AutoCoverage.vehicle_registrati: Official registration number of the insured vehicle.
attribute_information.coverage.AutoCoverage.vehicle_model: Model name of the insured vehicle.
attribute_information.coverage.AutoCoverage.vehicle_year: Year of manufacture of the insured vehicle.
attribute_information.coverage.AutoCoverage.liability_limit: Maximum amount covered for third-party liability claims.
attribute_information.coverage.AutoCoverage.collision_deductib: Amount the insured pays out-of-pocket for collision claims.
attribute_information.coverage.LifeCoverage.beneficiary_detail: Full legal name of the individual beneficiary.
Date of birth of the individual beneficiary.
Beneficiary's relationship to the policy holder.
Percentage of the benefit amount assigned to this beneficiary.
Contact phone number of the beneficiary.
Contact email address of the beneficiary.
Broad category of government-issued document (travel, driving, identity, civil).
Current verification status of the identity document (verified, pending, expired).
Two-line machine-readable zone (MRZ) string on the data page.
Number of blank visa pages remaining in the passport.
Coded restrictions on the driving privilege (e.g. corrective lenses required).
Number of years the national ID card is valid from the issue date.
Administrative district where the birth was officially registered.
